title: 10 best herbal tinctures for shortness of breath
description: Maidenhair tree tinctures helps with shortness of breath because its potent extract, Adiantum majus, has a profound impact on respiratory health. The tincture's anti-inflammatory properties soothe and relax the airways, reducing constriction and obstruction caused by allergies or chronic conditions.
